title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B QLoRA v4 Marker Gate
description: Short focused marker-gate repair after v3 improved the frozen gate from 0/5 to 1/5. Trains exact REQUIRED_MARKERS answer format without the broad JSON receipt corpus.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Answer in concise English, not JSON. Start with REQUIRED_MARKERS listing the exact gate words. Then explain the chemistry path and governance verdict. Use exact markers PASS and DENY when required.
notes: v4 targets exact marker recall, not broad chemistry knowledge.
If this passes, treat it as a gate-shape adapter and merge/stack with the broader chemistry adapter later.
If this fails, stop remote training and move the gate to a two-part raw/scaffold score before more spend.
